tools.name: Color Block
tools.description: Stack typed colour blocks — heading, text, headshot, logo — and they auto-compose into a grid that fills any frame.

tools.name: Dynamic Layout
tools.description: A do-anything layout that recomposes around whatever you add, at any size.

tools.name: Quote Card
tools.description: On-brand quote cards for social posts and slides.

tools.name: Meeting Planner
tools.description: Plan a global meeting and see the time for every teammate's timezone.

tools.name: Code Canvas
tools.description: Turn code snippets into clean, syntax-highlighted, shareable images.

tools.name: QR Code Generator
tools.description: On-brand QR codes for any URL, with full color and style control.

tools.name: Day Brief
tools.description: Quote of the day with live weather, time and a map for any city.

tools.name: Logo
tools.description: Place the SUSE logo — it auto-picks the right variant and exports vector.

tools.name: Email Signature
tools.description: An on-brand SUSE email signature, ready to paste into any client.

tools.name: Chart Creator
tools.description: On-brand charts from your data — bar, donut, pie or stacked. Exports vector.

tools.name: Bag Video
tools.description: An animated, on-brand video for bag visuals.

tools.name: Duotone Filter
tools.description: A two-color duotone for any photo — shadows one color, highlights another.

tools.name: Color Palette
tools.description: Browse SUSE brand colors — click a swatch to copy it.

tools.name: Countdown Timer
tools.description: A focused countdown with a live progress ring. Click to pause.

tools.name: URL Screenshot
tools.description: Any web page, at any scroll-depth, with custom CSS

tools.name: Street Map
tools.description: A clean, vector street-block map of a city — pan and zoom to frame the exact ~5-block view you want. Works fully offline.

tools.name: Strip Hidden Data
tools.description: Reveal and remove hidden metadata from images and PDFs. Runs on your device; nothing is uploaded.

tools.name: Text Helper
tools.description: Format, decode, hash and de-identify text — JSON, YAML, Helm, JWT and more. Runs on your device, so secrets never leave it.

tools.name: Event Name Badge
tools.description: Conference name badges — name, title, company, a colour-coded role and an optional QR. Print-ready, portrait or landscape.

tools.name: Wayfinding Signage
tools.description: Directional signs for events — a list of destinations, each with an arrow pointing the way. Print-ready, portrait or landscape.

tools.name: Brand Lockup
tools.description: Official SUSE logo lockups — chameleon + wordmark + a product, program, or team name, in horizontal or stacked layouts.

tools.name: Halftone Filter
tools.description: Turn any photo into a vector halftone — a grid of dots whose size follows the image's light and shade. Full colour control and crisp, scalable SVG or transparent PNG/WebP/AVIF output.

tools.name: Animated Ad
tools.description: Build a looping digital ad from a sequence of scenes — each animates in over the last. Exports a self-contained animated HTML banner, GIF, MP4/WebM, or a static poster, in every standard ad size.

tools.name: Calendar ICS
tools.description: Turn an event — name, date, time, location — into a calendar (.ics) file that drops straight into Outlook, Google Calendar, or Apple Calendar.

tools.name: Compress PDF
tools.description: Shrink a PDF by recompressing its images — on your device. Nothing is uploaded.

tools.name: Scanline Filter
tools.description: Turn any photo into a retro scanline: alternate lines drop out and the rest is posterised into brand tones as a grid of crisp rects. Scalable SVG or transparent PNG/WebP/AVIF.
